_comment: Anthropic API list prices in USD per million tokens, keyed by model family. Used by the Code tab (src/code_usage.py) to show the equivalent metered-API cost of host-side Claude Code usage that actually billed against the subscription. Per-MTok rates: input = base input; output = output; cache_write = 5-minute cache write (1.25x base input); cache_read = cache hit (0.1x base input). Refresh when Anthropic changes pricing.
